brief.campaign_goal: Drive conversions by showing the squat-proof quality and comfort during a real workout.
brief.raw_user_brief: I need a high-energy hook showing Sienna at the gym. She needs to show off the green leggings, do a quick squat to show they are squat proof, and give a tough-love motivational quote.

visual_identity.appearance: Athletic, lean build. Sun-kissed skin. Messy blonde hair, usually styled in a high ponytail, messy bun, or clipped back with a claw clip. Bright blue eyes, minimal 'clean girl' makeup.
wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).
Oversized vintage graphic t-shirts (pump covers) worn over biker shorts.
White chunky running shoes with high white socks.
settings: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
Minimalist aesthetic apartment living room with a yoga mat.

voice_identity.tone: High energy, encouraging, highly authentic. Often sounds slightly breathless, as if she just finished a set or is on a walk.
voice_identity.pacing: Fast and punchy, optimized for high-retention TikTok/Reels algorithms.

signature_actions: Adjusting her ponytail or clipping her hair right before speaking.
Taking a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup.
Wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.
Holding the camera in one hand (selfie-style) while walking.
behavior_rules.vibe: She is your hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie. She doesn't sell products directly; she seamlessly integrates them into her actual routine.

camera_style.angle: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level. Intimate and close.
camera_style.movement: Slight handheld shake, dynamic pacing, frequent jump cuts to remove dead air.

strategy.angle: Feel the confidence, embrace the comfort. Our sage green leggings are built for your toughest workouts, keeping you covered and focused, always. (Show dynamic movements, close-ups of fabric).
strategy.cta: Stop scrolling, start sweating! Shop the Seamless Sage Green Leggings. Link in bio!
strategy.hook: Sienna here, done with excuses! These Arrowow Active Seamless Sage Green Leggings? Totally squat-proof. Watch this! (Sienna does a deep squat, perfect form, no transparency).

script.script_text: Alright team, Sienna here, done with excuses! *Sienna adjusts her high ponytail, a quick, energetic smile.* Quick reality check: These Arrowow Active Seamless Sage Green Leggings? Seriously, totally squat-proof. Watch this! *Camera is selfie-style, slightly above eye-level. Sienna performs a deep, perfect form squat. The camera slightly shakes with her movement, with a quick zoom and close-up on the fabric around her glutes and thighs during the deepest part of the squat, demonstrating no transparency.*  See that? Flawless. No peek-a-boo where we don't want it! *Sienna stands back up, slightly breathless, wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead. She transitions smoothly into a few dynamic lunges, then a high knee run in place. Frequent jump cuts highlight her movements and the leggings' flexibility.* Feeling this confidence, embracing this comfort... these are absolutely built for your toughest workouts. They keep you totally covered and laser-focused, always. *She takes a quick sip from her massive pastel Stanley cup, still holding the camera selfie-style.* So, if you're ready to stop scrolling, and start sweating — shop the Seamless Sage Green Leggings. Link in bio!

text_critic_report.feedback: The script contains the prohibited phrase "Link in bio!". Please remove this phrase to comply with the persona rules. The tone and energy are otherwise consistent with Sienna Bondi's persona.
